description:
Poem and Tasaki try to help Akina hook up with Izubuchi. Togo and Poem`s little sisters tour the school.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: The Klutzy Health Representative and the Schoolgirl Who Slips Often / Taking More Supplementary Lessons with the Klutz on the Day Her Little Sister Is Touring the Klutz`s School
